description_long: This is a modern analog wristwatch with a black case and strap, displayed on a transparent stand. The watch face features a dark background with blue accents, including luminous hour markers, hands, and subdials, giving it a sporty chronograph appearance. The dial is detailed with multiple subdials and fine markings, suggesting additional timekeeping functions. The strap appears to be made of a flexible material, likely rubber or silicone, and is secured with a traditional buckle. The case is robust, with visible pushers and a crown on the right side for adjusting time and chronograph functions. A brand logo is visible on the upper center of the dial, adding a touch of authenticity and style.
description: A black analog wristwatch with blue-accented chronograph dial, luminous markers, and a rubber strap, displayed on a transparent stand. The design is sporty and modern, with detailed subdials and a visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed black and blue chronograph dial, luminous markers, and brand logo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and pushers on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black strap and traditional buckle closure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth case profile and strap attachment.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, stylized logo with text is visible at the upper center of the dial, just below the 12 o'clock marker.
attribute_dial_design: The dial features a chronograph layout with three subdials, luminous blue hour markers, and hands. The background has a textured pattern, and fine minute indices encircle the outer edge. The style is sporty and technical, with detailed markings and a layered look.
attribute_strap_type: Black rubber or silicone strap with a smooth finish and traditional buckle closure.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second) and three subdials for chronograph functions. Luminous elements are present on the hands and hour markers.
